_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Paper with LazyMC Hibernation
author: admin@example.com
description: PaperMC server with LazyMC hibernation. Server sleeps when no players are online and auto-wakes when a player connects. Powered by github.com/sleepachu-exe/pterodactyl-lazymc-egg
startup: curl -sSL -o start.sh https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sleepachu-exe/pterodactyl-lazymc-egg/main/start.sh && chmod +x start.sh && bash start.sh

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt-get update -y -q
apt-get install -y -q curl

GITHUB_RAW="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sleepachu-exe/pterodactyl-lazymc-egg/main"

echo ">>> Downloading install.sh from GitHub..."
curl -sSL -o /mnt/install.sh "${GITHUB_RAW}/install.sh"
echo ">>> Running install.sh..."
bash /mnt/install.sh

variables.description: PaperMC build number. Use 'latest' for the newest build.

variables.description: The name of the server jar file.
